OUR SERVICES

What we bring to you

All services

Hospitality

Manage the largest hotels in Iraq, Tulip Al-Rasheed, as well as hotels in Spain                                                             .

General Trading

Leading distributor of a diverse range of products with a portfolio of quality brands globally                                                                                    .

IT Solutions

Creating applications and systems, designing information technology infrastructure, and applying the latest technologies

Contracting

More than 40 commercial and residential properties ,commercial units, residential buildings, offices and other in Iraq in more than one governorate .

Digital Transformation

Designing integrated solutions, infrastructure, networking and information security                                                  .

Real Estates

Real estate investments in Dubai, including residential houses and commercial buildings in the areas of Jumeirah, Meydan and other luxury areas in Dubai .
WHO WE ARE

Our Mission

To be among the leading organizations throughout the fields of Hospitality, information technology, Contracting and Trading in offering superior quality services and continuous support for customers and to gain their trust through innovation and advancement to fulfill their needs and aspirations.

Our Projects

Our Projects

Makaa Land for hotel managementROYAL TULIP AL-RASHEED HOTEL

The largest and most luxurious hotel in Iraq 5 stars. With 450 rooms and more than 400 employees scattered over 8 departments

Sama Al-Naser Contracting & General TradingAwani Restaurant

One of the most important Luxury Restaurant in Najaf, Iraq which serve the best Levantine foods

Makaa Land for hotel managementHOTEL LA CASA DEL SOL

La Casa del Sol is a boutique hotel just 10 minutes walk from passeig de Gràcia

Makaa Land for hotel managementHOTEL DO: PLACA REIAL

Set on Plaza Reial and just off Las Ramblas, Hotel DO Plaça Reial features a spa, a rooftop pool and stylish rooms

Sama Al-Naser Services & IT SolutionsHelool ERP System

More than 14 Module to automate the workflow in the organization: Human Resources - Payroll - Accounting - Correspondence - Archiving - procurement.

Sama Al-Naser IT SolutionsTadawy Application

The first remote medical consultation application in Iraq, which includes 50 doctors and 15 medical specialties, and allows the user to see a doctor over the phone

Sama Al-Naser for Solutions and Information Technology SLF Adventures

The first application of its kind in the UAE to explore natural places and organize adventure trips with various tourism companies
